inputs.campaign_data: Variant A (Professional tone): 200 sends, 42 percent open rate, 8 percent reply rate, 3 demos booked, 1 closed deal ($8,500). Variant B (Casual tone): 200 sends, 38 percent open rate, 12 percent reply rate, 5 demos booked, 2 closed deals ($14,200). Variant C (Data-driven tone): 150 sends, 51 percent open rate, 6 percent reply rate, 2 demos booked, 0 closed deals. Campaign duration: 14 days. Target: B2B SaaS founders, MENA region.
